raw: {"questions":[{"label":"What’s most on mind","name":"What’s been most on your mind at work lately, Kenji?","description":"Safe opener that lets Kenji set the context before anything feels framed as a problem.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"landing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Expectation drift","name":"Where have expectations felt the least clear for you so far?","description":"Surfaces which parts of the role are still fuzzy without assuming failure.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Requirement shifts","name":"What changes in requirements have been hardest to work with?","description":"Gets specific about the shifting-input problem and how it affects his work.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Help feels safe","name":"When does asking for help feel easiest for you here?","description":"Explores psychological safety around support without making it a complaint question.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Proving yourself","name":"Where do you feel the most pressure to prove yourself right now?","description":"Surfaces self-imposed pressure and where it shows up in the work.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Hardest part","name":"What part of the role feels hardest in practice right now?","description":"Invites a concrete example of what is actually taxing him day to day.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Team friction","name":"What part of the team setup is making your work harder than it needs to be?","description":"Looks for process or structure friction he may be absorbing silently.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support that helps","name":"What kind of support from me would make the biggest difference right now?","description":"Moves toward practical support without reopening diagnosis or blame.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next two weeks","name":"What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?","description":"Closes on concrete next-step support and stabilisation.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
